notes: I've got some annoying issues w/ the game natively, so figured I'd give the Windows version (via Proton) a try, but in the end I couldn't get it to so much as launch.  Tried disabling esync and wine d3d11 (it requires DX11, so disabling d3d11 wasn't an option), it just hangs there for a bit and then dies without ever even creating a window.  Tried 3.16-9 Beta and 3.7-8 as well, with no luck on either.  Nothing useful in the logs, or on the console.  Given that there *is* the native version, I didn't bother investigating any further.
title: Sid Meier's Civilization®: Beyond Earth™
